Title: Requires the department of health to develop and maternal health care providers to distribute written information about episiotomy to maternity patients
Summary: Requires the department of health to develop and maternal health care providers to distribute written information about episiotomy to maternity patients.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to requiring the department of health to develop and maternal health care providers to distribute written information about episiotomy to maternity patients
